name: Cheese Toasts
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. In a shallow bowl, whisk together the eggs and mayonnaise.
3. On a plate, mix grated cheese with paprika and cayenne pepper.
4. Using cookie cutters, cut out rounds or triangles from the bread (or cut into strips).
5. Dip each piece of bread into the egg mixture, then coat it evenly with the cheese mixture on a well-buttered baking sheet.
6. Bake in the 400°F oven for 12 minutes, or until the tops are golden brown.
7. Turn and bake for an additional 3 minutes more.
Fat grams per serving: Approx. Cook Time: 15
